name: xiazai77--product-demo-video
description: Create product demo videos with voiceover, text overlays, and real browser interactions. Fully automated, zero cost. Uses Puppeteer (headless Chrome), edge-tts (Microsoft Neural TTS), PIL (text overlays), and FFmpeg (video encoding). Use when: user wants a demo video, product walkthrough, launch video, Product Hunt video, app showcase, or screen recording of a web application. Triggers: "demo video", "product video", "record demo", "launch video", "walkthrough video", "showcase video", "screen recording".
